notes.title: Trip to Lisbon
notes.markdown:
# Trip to Lisbon

Three days in Alfama, two in Belem, one day-trip to Sintra.

## Day 1
Walked the riverfront, dinner at Pap'Acorda.

notes.title: Sourdough notes
notes.markdown:
# Sourdough notes

## Base
- 500g bread flour
- 350g water (70% hydration)
- 100g levain
- 10g salt

Bulk ferment 4h at 76F, cold retard overnight.

notes.title: Conference talk outline
notes.markdown:
# Conference talk outline

## Hook
Most CLI tools assume a perfect filesystem.

## Body
- Filename pitfalls across SMB / APFS / exFAT
- Why rsync isn't enough
- The case for byte-cap probing

## Close
Lessons from icloud-backup.
